---
title: "Yijia's Blog"
subtitle: "The first principle is that you must not fool yourself and you are the person who is easiest to fool. — *Richard Feynman*"
page-layout: full
section-divs: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 6
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, author]
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: false
---
<style>
.g-col-12,
.g-col-md-4 {
  background: var(--background-secondary);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.4rem 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px var(--shadow);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
  color: var(--ink);
}

.g-col-12:hover,
.g-col-md-4:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(90, 103, 216, 0.13);
}

.g-col-12 h3,
.g-col-md-4 h3 {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.g-col-12 p,
.g-col-md-4 p {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin: 0;
}

#recent-posts {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
}

</style>

::: {.column-page}

## Welcome {.mt-4}

Welcome to my blog, where I share my thoughts and insights on **physics**, **mathematics**, and **philosophy**.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Experience Sharing
Personal stories, reflections, and advice from my path through physics, math, and philosophy.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Personal Reflections
Open-ended explorations of questions that arise during my studies — sometimes with answers, sometimes without.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Projects & Resources
Code and project releases from my own work or collaborations.
:::

:::

---

## Recent Posts {#recent-posts .mt-5}

:::
